title: Payroll Operations Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger payroll operations foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Payroll Operations Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Payroll Operations Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good payroll operations foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Payroll Operations Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
